description: Test whether the agent correctly uses CDP commands for browser automation

evals.prompt: Show me what tabs I have open in Chrome
evals.expected_output: Agent runs curl http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/list and displays the tab titles and URLs
Agent uses curl http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/new?url=https://github.com to open a new tab

evals.prompt: Get the text content from my current browser tab
evals.expected_output: Agent lists tabs to find the active one, then uses cdp_get_page_text.py with the tab ID

evals.prompt: Chrome CDP isn't responding, help me debug
evals.expected_output: Agent checks if Chrome is running with --remote-debugging-port=9222, verifies --user-data-dir is set, and suggests killing all Chrome processes before relaunching

evals.prompt: I'm on WSL2 and can't connect to Chrome on Windows port 9222
evals.expected_output: Agent checks networkingMode in .wslconfig, verifies mirrored mode, checks firewall setting, and references the troubleshooting guide
